headline: JP Morgan Maintains Neutral on Steel Dynamics, Raises Price Target to $262
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Bill Peterson   maintains Steel Dynamics (NASDAQ:STLD) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $210 to $262.
